meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build user onboarding to overcome the no portfolio trap. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid development.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by demonstrating product empathy, not just code. By building a high-conversion user onboarding flow, you prove you understand user retention and business value. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to implement the state management, turning a basic app into a professional-grade experience.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank screen, the weight of a dozen 'To-Do List' apps mocking your ambition. You have the technical skills, but recruiters see a ghost—zero production experience, zero user-facing complexity, and a portfolio that screams 'tutorial follower.' The industry doesn't need more code; it needs builders who understand how to guide a user from 'stranger' to 'power user' in under sixty seconds.

This is the pivot point. Instead of building another generic CRUD app, you are going to engineer a sophisticated onboarding flow. By mastering the psychology of the first-run experience, you transition from a coder who writes functions to a developer who ships solutions. Let’s turn that empty repository into a magnet for job offers.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Define the user journey stages: Welcome, Value Proposition, Action-Driven Setup, and Completion. This establishes your understanding of UX architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a 4-step onboarding flow schema for a SaaS product. Include states for 'Welcome', 'Feature Highlight', 'User Setup', and 'Completion'. Ensure the data structure supports progress tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new project folder and initialize a basic React structure with a state management hook for onboarding progress.'

steps.title: Implementing the State Machine
steps.description: Don't rely on messy boolean flags. Use a state machine to manage the onboarding steps to prevent users from getting stuck in invalid states.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust state machine implementation for an onboarding wizard. Include transitions between steps and error handling for incomplete inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a useOnboarding hook that manages the current step index and persists progress to localStorage.'

steps.title: Engineering High-Fidelity UI Components
steps.description: Build reusable, accessible components for the onboarding steps. Focus on layout consistency and smooth transitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of accessible onboarding UI components using Tailwind CSS. Include a progress bar, navigation buttons, and a 'Skip' feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a ProgressIndicator component and an OnboardingStep wrapper that animates transitions using Framer Motion.'

steps.title: Integrating Data Persistence
steps.description: Connect the onboarding flow to a backend or local database. This proves you understand how to manage user state across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a database schema for user onboarding completion status. Include fields for 'step_completed', 'user_id', and 'timestamp'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add a Firebase or Supabase integration to save the onboarding step progress whenever the user clicks Next.'

steps.title: Final Polish and Analytics Hooks
steps.description: Add tracking events to the onboarding flow. Showing you can track conversion rates makes your portfolio stand out as business-focused.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add analytics event triggers at each step of the onboarding flow. Ensure they capture 'step_started' and 'step_completed' events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add console logs or mock analytics calls to each transition in the onboarding state machine for tracking user drop-off.'

pro_tips: Always build for the 'Empty State'. If your app looks good with no data, you win.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—don't overwhelm the user with all features at once; show them one value-prop per step.
Add a 'Skip' button. Forcing onboarding on power users is the fastest way to lose them.
Document your decision-making process in the README. Recruiters love reading why you chose a state machine over simple booleans.
Record a 30-second screen capture of your onboarding flow and pin it to your GitHub profile. It’s worth more than 1,000 lines of code.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy it to Vercel and write a short blog post explaining the logic behind your state machine. Tag us on social media to show off your work.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. By mastering user onboarding, you differentiate your portfolio from every other student in the game. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
